# Fadlan Achmad Frizal — Portfolio & Professional Services

Official portfolio and services registry of Fadlan Achmad Frizal, a Fullstack Developer & DevOps Enthusiast based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

## About
Fadlan is a graduate in Software Engineering (RPL) from SMK Telkom Jakarta and a current student of Information Systems at Universitas Esa Unggul. He specializes in web development (React, Laravel), system administration, Linux VPS configuration, Docker containerization, CI/CD automation, and network monitoring (NOC).

## Freelance Services
Fadlan offers professional web development and systems engineering services via WhatsApp (+62 815-8435-0420):
- **Landing Page**: Modern landing pages for businesses and startups.
- **Fullstack Web Application**: Dynamic, interactive applications built with React/Vite (frontend) and Laravel (backend API) with databases.
- **Company Profile / Portofolio**: Custom profile websites for personal branding or business presentation.
- **VPS Setup & DevOps Deployment**: Configuring Linux VPS (Ubuntu), Docker containers, Nginx reverse proxy, and Cloudflare Tunnel integration.

## Key Technical Projects
- **Acentra Service**: Modern service business landing page. Features a cost calculator, custom static SSR prerender for SEO, and auto-deployment via Docker/Nginx/Cloudflare Tunnel on Linux VPS. (Demo: https://acentraservice.com)
- **Premium Office Booking (Wisma 46 Space)**: Platform for renting premium office spaces. Built with Laravel 11 API, React.js, Midtrans payment gateway, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline, Docker containerization, and Grafana monitoring. (Demo: https://w46space.nexvol.xyz/)
- **Car Service (AutoPro)**: Landing page for automotive workshop. Mobile-first design, WhatsApp booking integration, deployed via Docker, Nginx, and Cloudflare. (Demo: https://autopro.nexvol.xyz/)
- **Restaurant Franchise Platform**: Multi-page franchise platform. OOP PHP Native, MySQL, GitHub Actions pipeline, and Docker staging setup. (Demo: https://fiverestaurant.nexvol.xyz/)

## Work Experience
- **Network Operation Center (NOC) Staff** at PT Mitra Teknologi Andalan Utama (July 2025 — July 2026):
  - Monitored network stability using Polestar, UniFi, and Cisco vManage SD-WAN.
  - Handled incident troubleshooting, PuTTY/Winbox configurations, and trouble ticket documentation.
- **Media Social Support** at Media Indonesia (July 2023 — December 2023):
  - Managed LinkedIn publishing, video studio setups, and camera operation for program streaming.

## Skills Directory
- **Frontend & Fullstack**: Laravel, React.js, PHP (Native/OOP), Tailwind CSS v4, MySQL.
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, Linux VPS (Ubuntu), Git, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Nginx, Cloudflare, Grafana.
- **NOC & Networking**: SD-WAN vManage, UniFi, Cisco, Winbox (MikroTik), troubleshooting, network monitoring.
